UserProfile.title: UserProfile
UserProfile.description: Represents the public or shared details of a user profile (client, plumber, or crew member).

id.description: Unique user ID (matching Firebase Auth UID).

city.description: City of operation or residence (e.g. Pretoria).

popiaConsent.description: Indicates active agreement with POPIA privacy regulations.

plumberId.description: Unique assigned identification code (e.g. PLM-000001) for plumbers.

isPaid.description: Whether the plumber has paid their R50 monthly subscription.

subscriptionExpiry.description: Epoch timestamp when current monthly subscription expires.

isMaster.description: True if plumber is a master plumber who can register crew.

masterPlumberId.description: If crew member, references their master plumber user ID.

crewMemberIds.description: If master plumber, lists of up to 5 crew member user IDs.

bio.description: Plumber short biography and business profile introduction.

profilePhoto.description: Profile picture storage bucket path or secure URL.

workPhotos.description: Array of storage paths showcasing completed plumbing tasks.

activeJobId.description: If active, the calloutId of their single currently active job.

activeJob.description: Whether the plumber has an active job right now.

PrivateUserInfo.title: PrivateUserInfo
PrivateUserInfo.description: POPIA-sensitive personal contact and verification details for a user profile, accessible only to the owner.

hidePhoneFromPublic.description: Whether to hide phone number from other marketplace actors.

hideAddressFromPublic.description: Whether to hide street address details from other actors.

Callout.title: Callout
Callout.description: Represents a plumbing service job, which can be an Emergency call-out or a Standard job.

userId.description: UID of the client who posted the job.

jobCategoryId.description: The plumbing specialty category (e.g., Geyser, Burst Pipe, Drain).

projectName.description: Name of the project, which matches the selected job category.

projectDescription.description: Optional issue description or reported plumbing problem.

issueDescription.description: Required issue description for dispatcher reference (falls back if empty).

status.description: Current workflow state of the callout.

isEmergency.description: True if an emergency request, requiring terms acceptance.

termsAccepted.description: Must be true for emergency requests.

pdfUrl.description: Secure storage URL pointing to the downloadable South African legal contract PDF.

responsePeriod.description: Expected response period (e.g., Instant for emergency, 48-hours for standard).

assignedPlumberId.description: The UID of the assigned plumber or crew member assisting.

bannerPhoto.description: Optional storage URL of the banner photo.

beforePhoto.description: Optional storage URL of the work before photo.

progressPhoto.description: Optional storage URL of the work progress photo.

completedPhoto.description: Optional storage URL of the work completed photo.

isPrivateProject.description: Whether this project is private and should never expose images publicly.

photoPortfolioApproved.description: Whether the client approved displaying completed work in portfolio.

reviewRating.description: Feedback score (1 to 5 stars) given by the client.

reviewComment.description: Written review comment given by the client.

surveyFeedback.description: Detailed POPIA-compliant answers to survey questions.

signedOffAt.description: ISO timestamp when the client signed off on the completed project.

CalloutPIIDetails.title: CalloutPIIDetails
CalloutPIIDetails.description: POPIA-sensitive personal details of the client, hidden until a plumber accepts the job.

clientPhone.description: Contact phone number of the client.

clientAddress.description: Full street address for service dispatch.

ChatMessage.title: ChatMessage
ChatMessage.description: A single text message inside a job's real-time messaging channel.

read.description: Whether the recipient has seen the message.

createdAt.description: Epoch timestamp used for chronological sorting.

/users/{userId}.description: Main user collection containing basic profiles for clients, plumbers, and crew members.

/users/{userId}/private/info.description: Strictly guarded private information subcollection under each user.

/callouts/{calloutId}.description: Marketplace job postings containing general job requirements and dispatch status.

/callouts/{calloutId}/pii/details.description: Private client details, accessible only after the callout status is Accepted by an active plumber.

/callouts/{calloutId}/messages/{messageI.description: Real-time communication subcollection for messages exchanged between the client and plumber.
